title: Reject malformed blueprints with missing id/name before goal creation
description:
## Evidence
`BlueprintParser.Parse()` returns empty metadata on malformed input (returns `new Blueprint()` with empty Id/Name). `GoalFactory.CreateAsync()` accepts the blueprint without validation. `MemorySmithBlueprintRepository.GetAsync()` also doesn't validate.

## Impact
A malformed blueprint page becomes a `BuildGoal` with empty/inconsistent identity. Build facts, logs, and completion tracking drift because the blueprint key isn't trustworthy.

## Fix
1. Reject blueprint pages with missing id or name before returning them from the repository
2. Log a warning naming the malformed page and missing fields
3. Add tests for: empty id, missing name, parseable-but-malformed pages

## Verification
Verified against codebase 2026-06-23. See `Data/Pages/audits/msa-audit-verification-6-23.md` section F8.
